data.description: Encrypted payment data encoded as base64 string

applicationData.description: Hex encoded SHA–256 hash of the original payment request

ephemeralPublicKey.description: Base64 encoded X.509 public key. Applies only to `EC_v1` version

wrappedKey.description: Base64 encoded RSA public key. Applies only to `RSA_v1` version

transactionId.description: Hexadecimal transaction identifier generated on the device

signature.description: Base64 encoded PKCS #7 signature of the payment data and headers

version.description: Version information about the payment token

network.description: Payment card network. See [list](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/applepayontheweb/applepaypaymentrequest/supportednetworks) of supported card networks

type.description: Card type. See [list](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/applepayontheweb/applepaypaymentmethodtype) of supported card types

phoneticGivenName.description: Phonetic spelling of the contact's given name

phoneticFamilyName.description: Phonetic spelling of the contact's family name

subLocality.description: Additional information associated with the location, typically defined at the city or town level (such as district or neighborhood), in a postal address

postalCode.description: Zip code or postal code for the contact

subAdministrativeArea.description: Subadministrative area (such as a county or other region) in a postal address

country.description: Name of the country or region for the contact

primaryAccountIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the primary account number for the payment card

primaryAccountNumberSuffix.description: Version of the primary account number suitable for display in your UI

deviceAccountIdentifier.description: Unique identifier for the device-specific account number

deviceAccountNumberSuffix.description: Version of the device account number suitable for display in your UI

activationState.description: Payment pass activation state. See [list](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/applepayontheweb/applepaypaymentpassactivationstate) of supported states
